text:
The Tiger-Gorilla is an enemy chimera from Fullmetal Alchemist and the Broken Angel who appears as a boss character.

Appearance

Seemingly made from multiple white tigers and one gorilla, this chimera has three long striped tails and a white, striped coat of fur. It is bipedal where it sports gorilla arms. Its face is usually concealed by a skeletal mask with multiple pink feathers on the back of it. Underneath the mask is a tiger-like face.
